text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-services
step.action: List every public-facing URL/app/kiosk; exclude internal-only systems.

step.name: run-audit
step.decision-gate: If audit incomplete by 30 days pre-deadline, escalate to leadership.

step.name: gap-analysis
step.action: Map each finding to remediation cost + ETA; flag findings that cannot complete by deadline.
